## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `node --check` passes on all touched renderer files
- [ ] If I changed `src/mobile/bridge.js`, I ran `npm run build:mobile` and committed `src/renderer/mobile-bridge.js`
- [ ] New user-facing strings use `I18n.t(...)` (no hardcoded text)
- [ ] The change works on both Desktop and Android (or is intentionally platform-specific)
